  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Remove a token"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/v1/token/{token}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Delete an access token

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"x-ee-timeout","in":"header","schema":{"type":"integer","description":"Request timeout in milliseconds (overrides EENGINE_TIMEOUT environment variable)","minimum":0,"maximum":7200000},"description":"Request timeout in milliseconds (overrides EENGINE_TIMEOUT environment variable)"},{"name":"token","in":"path","schema":{"type":"string","description":"Access token","example":"123456","x-constraint":{"length":64},"x-format":{"hex":{"byteAligned":false,"prefix":false}}},"description":"Access token","required":true}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Successful","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"deleted":{"type":"boolean","description":"Was the token deleted","default":true}},"title":"DeleteTokenRequestResponse"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
